subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee in His glorious station, that He may draw thee nigh unto God, the Mighty, the Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود ذکرک المظلوم فی مقامه المحمود لیقربک الی الله العزیز الودود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
